title: monardella villosa var. subserrata
intro: Monardella villosa var. subserrata is a variety of the Desert Honeysuckle plant, native to California and Baja California in Mexico. It is a shrub with pink or purple flowers that has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Monardella villosa var. subserrata include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in herbal blends for their medicinal properties.
